task_type: Type C small additive implementation - synthetic-fixture-only contract validator hardening
source_decision: P258F_D3_READ_ONLY_CONTRACT_VALIDATORS_READY - harden validators using synthetic fixtures only
edge_cases_covered: allowed statuses remain exactly REJECTED and NOT_YET_REJECTED

validation_result_semantics.success: Returns immutable ValidationResult objects for synthetic fixtures that are structurally complete and internally aligned.
validation_result_semantics.non_semantics: Success is not gate survival, not candidate scoring, not approval, not production readiness, not recommendation permission, and not an accuracy claim.

proof_no_real_candidate_methods_used: All fixtures are synthetic literals built in tests only. No real candidate methods or real strategy outputs were used as fixture inputs.
proof_no_executable_gate_evaluation: No orchestrator/evaluator module or gate-execution path exists. The validators only check synthetic metadata and return ValidationResult or raise ContractValidationError.
proof_no_null_generation: No null factory exists. Null-related checks only validate declared metadata such as null_count and null_generation_seed.
proof_no_pvalue_statistical_test_or_back: No p-value computation, paired test, bootstrap, McNemar test, draw loop, strategy execution, or backtest function exists in the validators or tests.
proof_no_forbidden_paths_touched: Validators and tests import only stdlib helpers and local schemas. No DB, recommendation, registry, production, controlled_apply, deployment, backtest, fetcher, network, random, numpy, or scipy imports.

next_allowed_task.title: D3 read-only contract-validation integration plan only
next_allowed_task.type: read-only integration plan only; no real candidate methods, no executable gate evaluation, no null generation, no p-values, no paired tests, no backtest
next_allowed_task.precondition: P258G merged and separate explicit authorization for P258H

forbidden_next_tasks: running D3 on real candidate methods
